query:
SELECT wi.id, wi.guestSessionId, wi.itemType, wi.name, gs.fingerprint 
FROM wardrobeItems wi 
JOIN guestSessions gs ON wi.guestSessionId = gs.id 
ORDER BY wi.id DESC LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute SELECT wi.id, wi.guestSessionId, wi.itemType, wi.name, gs.fingerprint 
FROM wardrobeItems wi 
JOIN guestSessions gs ON wi.guestSessionId = gs.id 
ORDER BY wi.id DESC LIMIT 10;
